message:
fix: replace dolthub/dolt with nil-check fork to fix SEGVs (#1778)

Adds replace directive pointing to zfogg/dolt fork which includes nil
pointer checks from dolthub/dolt#10539 (still open upstream). Fixes
nil pointer dereference panics during DoltDB initialization.

Temporary fix - remove replace directive once upstream PR merges.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
